HGSS.119.0000:
Hey!\f
I am the Karate King!
I train alone here in the cave!\f
You!
Battle with me! Hwaaarggh!\f
HGSS.119.0001:
I... I’m crushed...\f
My training is still not enough...
But a loss is a loss. I admit it.\f
As proof that you defeated me, I’ll give
you a rare Fighting-type Pokémon.\f
HGSS.119.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received TYROGUE from
the Karate King!
HGSS.119.0003:
TYROGUE is a Fighting type.
It evolves into a tougher Pokémon.\f
Keep up the hard work. I’ll keep
training too. Farewell!
HGSS.119.0004: You have no room in your party!
HGSS.119.0005:
Give a nickname to the TYROGUE you
received? [0200,0000]
